title: theobroma balaense
intro: Theobroma balaense is a species of plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the bala tree, native to the tropical regions of South America. The bark and leaves of the Theobroma balaense plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Theobroma balaense include infusions and decoctions made from its bark and leaves, which are used to treat various ailments.
